name: visualhyper-codex-panel
description: Local-first Kanvis workspace for applying reusable video Style Skills with HyperFrames.

interface.shortDescription: Apply reusable video Style Skills in a local Codex workspace.
interface.longDescription: Kanvis provides a project-local workspace for choosing reusable video Style Skills, supplying source material, previewing and adjusting HyperFrames projects, and rendering verified MP4 outputs.
defaultPrompt: Open Kanvis fullscreen inside Codex for this project.
Use an existing Style Skill in Kanvis to make a video from my material.
Show the current Kanvis video project status.
